title: Otis to Host 2024 Investor Day
text: FARMINGTON, Conn. , Nov. 29, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Otis Worldwide Corporation (NYSE: OTIS) will host its 2024 Investor Day on Thursday, February 15, 2024, in New York City.

title: AZEK to Report Solid Q4 Earnings on Strong Residential Unit
text: AZEK's operational excellence, sourcing savings and recycling initiatives and lower raw material costs are likely to aid its fiscal fourth-quarter performance.

title: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) Up 12.5% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
text: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: OTIS Benefits From R&D Investments, Solid Backlog Level
text: OTIS benefits from robust R&D investments and operational improvements, reflecting solid backlog and order volume.

title: Otis Commits to Setting Science-Based Targets to Reduce Greenhouse Gas Emissions
text: Submits Proposed Near-Term Targets to SBTi FARMINGTON, Conn. , Nov. 9, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Otis Worldwide Corporation (NYSE: OTIS) today announced its commitment to setting near-term science-based greenhouse gas (GHG) reduction targets, which have been formally submitted to the Science Based Targets Initiative (SBTi) for evaluation.

title: KBR Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Miss, Stock Down
text: KBR's third-quarter earnings reflect its solid segmental growth and strong execution across the business.
